name_en: 🔥 New Glossy Calfskin 💥 Puzzle Fold Cropped handbag plays with geometric shapes again ⭐️ Inspired by the geometric lines of the classic handbag series, reinterpreted with inlays full of geometric architectural beauty, can be folded completely, a good companion for travel. The brand uses creative ingenuity to create soft and lightweight handbags, paired with low-key and elegant brand logos. This cropped version is made of glossy Nappa cowhide. 🌹 This continues the geometric aesthetics of the Puzzle series 🌼 Inspired by origami bags, allowing this Puzzle Fold Cropped to switch freely between 3D and flat 🌺 The leather is very fine. The Puzzle Fold handbag draws inspiration from the geometric lines of the brand's classic handbag series 👛 This version is made of soft glossy cowhide 🔥 Handle length 29CM Size: 39CM~12.3CM~12.5CM
